/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libbuilding_transform_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libbuilding_transform_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/building_transform_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/building_transform_interface/msg/detail/base_armor__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/building_transform_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/building_transform_interface/msg/detail/time_info__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
